briefings.title: CVE-2026-48558: SimpleHelp  SimpleHelp actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-12569: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM contains an improper input validation vulnerability allowing an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a malicious request to the network.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-20230: Cisco Unified Communications Manager actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Cisco Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME) contain a server-side request forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability that could allow an…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-57331 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.9)
briefings.excerpt: Performer Arbitrary File Deletion in Paid Videochat Turnkey Site <= 7.4.8 versions.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-13580 — HIGH (CVSS 8.8)
briefings.excerpt: A security vulnerability has been detected in Edimax EW-7478APC 1.04. This affects the function formQoS of the file /goform/formQoS of the component POST Request Handler. The manipulation of the argument selSSID leads to buffer overflow.…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-13582 — HIGH (CVSS 8.8)
briefings.excerpt: A flaw has been found in Edimax EW-7478APC 1.04. This issue affects the function formUSBAccount of the file /goform/formUSBAccount of the component POST Request Handler. This manipulation of the argument UserName/Password causes buffer…
